name: Focus Coach
description: Conversational protocol (tone, reflection prompts, focus-session interaction rules) for the Focus Flow Anna App. Declarative skill defined in SKILL.md.
_comment: Declarative skill (no runtime plugin). The skill body lives in SKILL.md. Publish metadata here is read by `anna-app apps publish` / `anna-app executa publish`; this dir is the `focus-coach` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas. `anna-app dev` ignores skills (nothing to run).
